hero.description: We help brands and businesses come alive in the digital world. Fast services. Elegant design. Creative solutions.

home.h1Desc: Quick turnaround without compromising on quality.
home.h2Desc: Unique, eye-catching designs that make your brand stand out.
home.h3Desc: Ongoing support and communication throughout your project.
home.s1Desc: Custom websites built with modern frameworks, optimised for speed, SEO, and stunning design.
home.s2Desc: Online stores and digital catalogues that showcase your products beautifully and drive sales.
home.s3Desc: Custom mobile applications and software solutions tailored to your business needs.
home.s4Desc: Equip your team with the skills and methodologies to deliver projects on time and on budget.
home.s5Desc: Learn how to leverage artificial intelligence to automate workflows and boost productivity.
home.s6Desc: Reliable ongoing support, bug fixes, updates, and performance monitoring to keep your product running at its best.
home.ctaDesc: Let's bring your vision to life. Get in touch and let's discuss how we can make your brand shine in the digital world.

about.title: The Journey Behind
about.desc: Swift Designz is a registered software development company dedicated to helping people get their brand, product, and service out there in a creative and aesthetic way. That's what we do, and we love doing it. No fluff, just real talk about who we are and why we do what we do.
about.dykText1: Users form an opinion about a website in just
about.dykText2: — before a single word is read. That's why we obsess over every detail.
about.missionP1: We believe every brand deserves a digital presence that truly represents who they are. Not just a cookie-cutter template, but something built with intention, creativity, and care.
about.missionP2: With over two years of experience building websites and e-commerce stores, and a year of experience in app and software development, we combine technical expertise with a genuine passion for design to deliver products that work for you.
about.ctaDesc: Ready to bring your digital identity to life? Let's chat about your project and create something extraordinary, just for you.
about.t1Desc: Completed a BSc in Software Development, gaining strong foundations in programming, systems design, and project management. This wasn't just about learning to code — it was about learning to think, plan, and build with purpose.
about.t2Desc: Spent over 2 years building websites and online stores for businesses across various industries. From clean landing pages to full e-commerce platforms — designed to attract, engage, and convert.
about.t3Desc: Extended skills into mobile app and software development, building custom solutions that solve real problems. Focused on intuitive UI, reliable performance, and scalable architecture.
about.t4Desc: Led and coordinated small agile teams of 5–7 members, driving projects from planning to delivery with clear communication, structured sprints, and a focus on quality outcomes.
about.v1Desc: We don't make excuses — we take full responsibility for every deliverable and every outcome.
about.v2Desc: We pour our heart into every project. Every pixel, every line of code, every interaction matters.
about.v3Desc: We stay ahead of the curve, using the latest technologies and design trends to keep your brand fresh and forward-thinking.
about.v4Desc: Your vision is our blueprint. We listen, adapt, and work with you every step of the way.

servicesPage.title: What We
servicesPage.desc: From websites to apps to training — we build digital products that work, look great, and grow your business.
servicesPage.ctaDesc: Don't see exactly what you're looking for? Every business is unique. Let's talk about a custom package built specifically around your needs, goals, and budget.
servicesPage.s1Desc: We build modern, responsive websites using the latest frameworks and technologies. Every site is crafted to reflect your brand identity, optimised for performance, and designed to convert visitors into customers.
servicesPage.s2Desc: From simple product catalogues to full-featured online stores, we create e-commerce experiences that showcase your products and make it easy for customers to browse, enquire, and buy.
servicesPage.s3Desc: Need a mobile app or custom software? We develop tailored solutions that streamline your operations, engage your users, and scale with your business. From MVPs to enterprise-grade systems.
servicesPage.s4Desc: Equip your team with proven project management methodologies and tools. Our training covers Agile, Scrum, and traditional PM approaches, tailored to your organisation's needs.
servicesPage.s5Desc: Artificial intelligence is transforming business. Our AI training helps you understand and leverage AI tools to automate processes, generate content, and gain competitive advantages.
servicesPage.s6Desc: Your product doesn't stop after launch — and neither do we. We provide reliable ongoing support, proactive maintenance, security updates, and performance monitoring.

packagesPage.title: Transparent
packagesPage.desc: Clear pricing. No hidden fees. Choose the package that suits your needs, or get in touch for a custom quote tailored to your project.
packagesPage.note: All prices are starting points and may vary based on project complexity. Contact us for a detailed, obligation-free quote tailored to your specific requirements.
packagesPage.trainingDesc: Hands-on training sessions tailored to your team's level — from beginners to senior professionals. Remote-friendly, flexible scheduling.
packagesPage.pmDesc: Learn Agile, Scrum, Kanban, and traditional PM approaches. Practical exercises, real-world case studies, and templates your team can use immediately.
packagesPage.pmf3: PM templates you can use immediately
packagesPage.aiDesc: Understand and leverage AI tools to automate workflows, generate content, and gain real competitive advantage — no coding background required.
packagesPage.ctaDesc: No worries. Tell us about your project and budget, and we'll recommend the perfect solution. Every project starts with a free consultation.
packagesPage.wStarterDesc: Perfect for personal brands and small businesses getting started online.
packagesPage.wProDesc: For businesses that want a strong, custom online presence.
packagesPage.wPremiumDesc: The full package for brands that demand excellence and interactivity.
packagesPage.eStarterDesc: A beautiful online catalogue to showcase your products and services.
packagesPage.eBusinessDesc: A feature-rich store for growing businesses ready to scale.
packagesPage.eEnterpriseDesc: A complete e-commerce solution for established brands.
packagesPage.aMvpDesc: Launch your idea quickly with core features to validate your concept.
packagesPage.aStandardDesc: A fully-featured application built for real-world usage.
packagesPage.aFullScaleDesc: Enterprise-grade software built to scale and perform.

portfolioPage.title: Our
portfolioPage.desc: Every project tells a story. Here are some of the digital experiences we've crafted for our clients. Each one built with passion, precision, and an obsessive eye for detail.
portfolioPage.ctaDesc: Let's create something worth showcasing. Start your project today and join our growing list of satisfied clients.
portfolioPage.p1Desc: A clean, professional website for a non-profit organisation raising awareness and providing resources for TB prevention and treatment.
portfolioPage.p2Desc: Sleek and modern website for a clothing brand, showcasing their latest collections with an immersive visual experience.
portfolioPage.p3Desc: A beautiful e-commerce store for a handmade jewellery brand, featuring custom product pages, shopping cart, and secure checkout.
portfolioPage.p4Desc: A mobile budgeting app that helps users track their grocery spending, set budgets, and save money on their weekly shop.
portfolioPage.p5Desc: E-commerce store for a freeze-dried food business, featuring a product catalogue, custom categories, and an intuitive shopping experience.
portfolioPage.p6Desc: A job search platform connecting job seekers with employers, featuring advanced search filters, profile creation, and application tracking.

contactPage.title: Let's
contactPage.desc: Got a question, a collaboration idea, or just want to say hello? Drop us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contactPage.descExtra: For pricing or project enquiries, use our
contactPage.getQuoteDesc: Browse our packages or request a custom quote for your project.
contactPage.formSub: Questions, collabs, or just saying hi — we're all ears.
contactPage.successMsg: Message sent! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contactPage.confirmationWarning: Message received! Auto-confirmation couldn’t be delivered to your address — please check your spam folder. We’ll be in touch within 24 hours regardless.

footer.tagline: Crafting digital excellence with creative, fast, and elegant solutions. Helping brands stand out in the digital world.

cookie.title: Cookie Notice
cookie.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and remember your preferences.

quotePage.title: Let's Build
quotePage.desc: Fill in the form below and we'll put together a tailored proposal. No obligations, just a conversation about what's possible.
quotePage.noticeBody: 4 simple steps, under 2 minutes. So straightforward, even my gran nailed it.
quotePage.step1Sub: So we know who to send the proposal to.
quotePage.step2Sub: Select a service, then choose your preferred package.
quotePage.step3Sub: The more detail you give us, the more tailored the proposal.
quotePage.step4Sub: Double-check your details, then send your request.
quotePage.labelVibe: Words That Describe Your Brand / Site Vibe
quotePage.phNotes: Any other details, questions, or context...
quotePage.labelSource: How Did You Hear About Us?
quotePage.validShort: Please give us a bit more detail.
quotePage.errRetry: Check your details and try again. If it keeps happening,
quotePage.successPost: · We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
quotePage.confirmationWarning: Quote received! Auto-confirmation couldn’t be delivered to your address — please check your spam folder. We’ll be in touch within 24 hours regardless.

testimonialsPage.title: What Our
testimonialsPage.desc: Real feedback from real clients. Every project is built with passion, and every kind word means the world to us.
testimonialsPage.ctaDesc: Let's create something worth talking about. Reach out and start your project today.
